description: OpenHands answer-evaluator app gate JSON output.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); ['sufficient','mixed','insufficient'].includes(data.verdict) && data.answered_count === 2 && data.vague_count >= 1 && data.total_count === 3 && ['run_research','revise'].includes(data.gate_decision) && Array.isArray(data.per_question) && data.per_question.length === 3 && data.per_question.some((q) => q.question_id === 'Q3' && q.verdict === 'vague')
